title: onosma alborosea var. sanguinolenta
intro: Onosma alborosea var. sanguinolenta is a plant species within the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a variety of the Bleeding Star or Yellow Gentian. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of the alkaloid sanguinarine, which has shown antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Onosma alborosea var. sanguinolenta has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
